config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should routinely take priority over individual rights, because once you make that the default, it becomes too easy for governments or majorities to justify abuse in the name of the common good. In my view, society is strongest when individual rights are protected first, while public interests are pursued through fair laws and real consent, not coercion. There are times when limits are necessary, but they should be narrow and carefully justified, not a blanket rule.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan "demi kebaikan bersama" dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu seharusnya menjadi batas dasar yang tidak boleh dilanggar sembarangan, sementara kepentingan publik dicapai lewat hukum yang adil, transparan, dan benar-benar perlu. Tentu ada keadaan darurat, seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, ketika pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi itu harus sempit dan diawasi ketat. Kalau tidak, mayoritas bisa terlalu mudah menekan minoritas dan mengorbankan kebebasan yang justru membuat masyarakat sehat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over individual rights as a general rule, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse weak accountability. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights are absolute in every situation; public health, disaster response, and security can justify limited restrictions when they are necessary and clearly temporary. The real issue is not choosing society or the individual as a slogan, but making sure the state cannot hide abuse behind the language of collective interest. A healthy society should protect rights first and then prove any limitation is truly necessary, not just politically convenient.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat bahwa ketika “kepentingan masyarakat” dijadikan prioritas default, hak minoritas dan kebebasan sipil paling sering yang dikorbankan. Argumen tentang kesehatan publik, keamanan, atau bencana memang bisa membenarkan pembatasan sementara, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasannya harus sempit, terukur, dan mudah diawasi, bukan diberi cek kosong. Kekhawatiran tentang penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh mayoritas bukan teori abstrak bagi saya; sejarah Amerika penuh contoh ketika retorika kebaikan bersama dipakai untuk membatasi kebebasan orang lain. Jadi, bagi saya, hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, dan kepentingan masyarakat hanya boleh membatasi hak itu jika benar-benar perlu dan dapat dibuktikan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the statement as a general rule, because in Indonesia the phrase "for society" is often used to pressure people into silence and make unfair policies sound noble. Public interests do matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights, because once that becomes the default, minorities and critics are the first to lose protection. I also do not buy the idea that collective good is somehow safer just because it sounds moral; without strict limits, it becomes a convenient excuse for power. For me, the better principle is that individual rights come first, and any restriction must be specific, necessary, and genuinely accountable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena dari pengalaman saya di Amerika, ketika “kepentingan masyarakat” dijadikan prioritas default, hak minoritas dan kebebasan sipil justru paling mudah dikorbankan. Argumen demi kesehatan publik atau keamanan memang bisa sah, tetapi hanya jika pembatasannya sempit, sementara, dan benar-benar bisa diawasi; kalau tidak, itu cuma memberi cek kosong kepada negara. Saya juga tidak percaya bahwa sesuatu menjadi lebih benar hanya karena dibungkus sebagai kebaikan bersama, sebab sejarah kami menunjukkan betapa sering retorika itu dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Jadi bagi saya, hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, dan kepentingan masyarakat hanya boleh membatasi hak itu bila memang perlu dan dapat dibuktikan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
